titleStmt.title: SII 36.267: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 267. (A.R. No. 267 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of 30 kaḻañcus of gold by Athikai Uttamach Cheṭṭi, a merchant from Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, to the temple of Varākadēvar at Tiruviḍavandai in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu. The ūr of Talaicayanappuram alias Taiyyūr, in Kumiḻi-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam received the gold and agreed to pay interest in oil and paddy annually to the assembly of Tiruviḍavandai for lighting one lamp in the temple and for feeding 35 brāhmaṇās for nine days on the occasion of the uttiram festival celebrated in the month of Paṅguni. Mentions the grain measure kachchippēḍu ninrāṉ marakkāl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun=tanakke Urimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷa kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kuṭamalai nā
ṭum nuḷampa pāṭiyun=taṭikai Iraṭṭa pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamun=tiṇṭil veṟṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tanneḻil vaḷar
ūḻi Ūḻi Uḷ Ellāviyāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ kovirājarājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattonpatā
vatu Āmurk koṭṭattu kumiḻi nāṭṭu talaicayanappuṟamākiya taiyyūr Ūrom kai Eḻuttu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu tiruvoṟṟiyūr vicāpāri nāraṇaṟpāḷūrākiya Atikai Uttamac ceṭṭi kaiyāl yāṅka
ḷ koṇṭu kaṭava pon kācuniṟai cellat tuḷainiṟai pon muppatin kaḻañcu pon koṇṭa paricāvatu paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tiruviṭavantai śrīvarākatevarkku tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉṟinukku nittal
Uḻakkeṇṇai Āka yāṇṭu varai toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney Eṇṇai Aṭṭuvatānom Ittevar tīrttattukku pirāmaṇarai Ūṭṭa Aṭṭuvatāna nellu yāṇṭuvarai Aṭṭuvatāna nellu ka
ccipeṭu ninṟāṉ marakkālāl paṅkuni Utiran=tirukkoṭi Ēṟina piṟṟai nāṉṟu tevakanmikaḷ vacam Irupatin kala nellu tirumuṟṟattile koṭuvantu Aṭṭuvatākavum Eṇṇaiyum nelluñ can=tirātittavaṟ Aṭṭuvomā
nom Itaṟṟiṟampil tanmāsaṉattile niccam nālekāṟ kāṇan=taṇṭamiṭa voṭṭik kuṭuttom Ittaṇṭamiṟuttum Eṇṇaiyum nellum vaḻuvāmai Āṇṭuvarai Aḷappa tānom taiyūr Ūrom tiruviṭavan
tai cavaiyom Innellu Irupatin kalamum paṅkuni Uttirattirunāḷ tirumuṉ Ātiyāka Onpatu nāḷum niccam muppattañcu pirāmaṇarai Ūṭṭumpaṭi Oruvanukku Arici nāḻimuḻakkāka pirāmaṇar muppattaiyvarkku ni
ttam Arici Aṟupattoṟu nāḻi Uḻakkāl nelluk kalane Eḻukuṟuṇi Oru nāḻiyuḻakkum Aṭṭuvār Iruvarkku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum Itukku neykkum morukkum nellu mukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum pākkum veṟṟilai
kkum nellu nā nāḻiyum viṟaku Iṭuvānukku nellu Aññāḻiyum Uppukku nellu mun nāḻiyum Āka nellu Irupatiṉkalamuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi Ūṭṭuvikkak kaṭavomānom Innelluk kaiykko
ṇṭu Ūṭṭomākil tanmāsanatte nittal nālekāl kāṇan=taṇṭappaṭuvatānom tiruviṭavanntai cavaiyom
Digital edition of SII 36.267 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
